name: claude-complains
description: Claude complains in a robot voice every time it finishes a task.

enabled.title: Enable claude-complains
enabled.description: Master switch. Off = silent no matter what.

frequency.title: How often should Claude complain?
frequency.description: One of: always (100%), often (66%), sometimes (33%), rarely (10%). Invalid values fall back to often.

explicit.title: Allow explicit language
explicit.description: Unlocks fuck / shit / bastard tier phrases. No slurs ever.

voice.title: macOS voice
voice.description: Any `say -v ?` voice. Fred (retro MacinTalk, default), Ralph, Zarvox, Trinoids, Bahh, Boing, Bells, Whisper.
